name: SurvivalEXtreme
short_description: Enter a world devastated by the 2050 apocalypse. Fifty years later, humanity has returned… The war to reclaim Earth has begun, and only the bravest will be able to face the demons that now rule it. The world has fallen. Now it's your turn to rise.
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a future where the apocalypse consumed Earth in the year 2050.
Fifty years later, humanity finally returns to reclaim what was lost, igniting a relentless war against the demons that now rule the planet.

SurvivalEXtreme combines three intense experiences: multiplayer mode, single-player mode, and now the new competitive FPS mode, designed for the most tactical and aggressive players.

Create and customize your character, develop your combat style, and build a reputation that unlocks upgrades, abilities, and exclusive gear.
Legends are made here. What will yours be?

Game Modes

Cooperative Survival (4 players)

Face waves of demons alongside three other players, earn money, upgrade your equipment, and evolve your character into a true war machine.

New Competitive FPS Mode

Fast-paced action with classic and intense game modes such as:

  • Team Deathmatch

  • Capture the Flag

  • Free for All

  • Domination
